LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. CASE IS REMANDED BACK FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S OPINION AND LEAVING RESPONDENT TO PROCEED IN ANY WAY IT VIEWS APPROPRIATE IN THE FURTHER EVALUATION OF THIS LICENSE APPLICATION. PER DIEM FEES ASSESSED BY THE COURT. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
